pr.title: Non-record: Fused Softcap+CE Megakernel (1.94x vs torch.compile) + N-gram Backoff

output.summary: Makora-generated fused softcap+CE CUDA megakernel accelerates the VRL+LeakyReLU² stack while staying compatible with sliding-window eval and n-gram backoff.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Not a val-only training regime; regular training with validation evaluation.
techniques: Makora-generated fused softcap and cross-entropy kernel
bf16 inputs with float32 accumulation for accuracy
VRL+LeakyReLU² backbone with sliding-window eval plus n-gram backoff
